title: Update Alarm
description: Updates an alarm on the given device. This endpoint is supported for trackers that support alarms.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: tracker-id
parameters.description: The ID of the tracker for which the alarm is created. The tracker-id can be found by using the Get Devices endpoint.

parameters.name: alarm-id
parameters.description: The ID of the alarm to be updated. The alarm-id can be found by using the Get Alarms endpoint.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: The time of day and UTC offset that the alarm vibrates in the format HH:mm-offset, e.g. 07:00-08:00.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Enables the alarm to vibrate. Supported : true | false

parameters.name: recurring
parameters.description: Defines the alarm as a recurring (true) or a single event (false). Supported : true | false

parameters.name: weekDays
parameters.description: A comma separated list of days of the week which the alarm vibrates. Supported : MONDAY | TUESDAY | WEDNESDAY | THURSDAY | FRIDAY | SATURDAY | SUNDAY

parameters.name: snoozeCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of times allowed to snooze alarm.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label or name for the alarm.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : alarmId
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the alarm ID.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : deleted
response_fields.description: Indicates if an alarm has been deleted. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : enabled
response_fields.description: Indicates if an alarm is enabled. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : recurring
response_fields.description: Indicates if an alarm is recurring. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : snoozeCount
response_fields.description: Indicates the number of times the alarm will snooze.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : snoozeLength
response_fields.description: Indicates the time in minutes between snooze periods.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : time
response_fields.description: The time range for the specified alarm.

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : vibe
response_fields.description: Returns the type of vibration configured. Supported : DEFAULT

response_fields.name: trackerAlarm : weekDays
response_fields.description: Returns the recurring days of the week which the alarm is set. Supported : MONDAY | TUESDAY | WEDNESDAY | THURSDAY | FRIDAY | SATURDAY | SUNDAY
